H3: What production times are available for custom yard signs? ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW # Custom Yard Signs in Any Size for Outdoor Advertising ## Durable Corrugated Plastic Yard Signs - Order Custom Sizes Today PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size: Choose your custom yard sign dimensions Quantity: Select number of yard signs needed Sides: Single or double-sided printing options Material: 4mm corrugated plastic (standard) Finishing: White margin or full bleed edge Accessories: H-stakes, beefy stakes, zip ties available PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Yard Sign Material for Outdoor Durability

All signs greater than 32" x 48" in any direction are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.

If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300.

Please note: When ordering yard signs with different designs, text, imagery, etc., these signs will be priced and processed as 1 sign per design.

Custom sized yard signs serve as a flexible advertising solution for businesses, political campaigns, real estate listings, and special events. These corrugated plastic signs are manufactured from lightweight 4mm material that withstands outdoor weather conditions while remaining cost-effective compared to other signage methods.

Our custom yard signs are digitally printed in full color on durable white corrugated plastic material. This material features hollow flutes running horizontally, similar to cardboard construction, providing structural strength while maintaining lightweight portability. The 4mm corrugated plastic is waterproof and UV-resistant, making it ideal for extended outdoor display.

Please note: All coroplast yard signs will be cut 1/8th of an inch on each side to allow for finishing. (ex. an 18" x 24" yard sign will actually ship as 17.75" x 23.75"). If your yard sign needs precise dimensions, please contact our customer service team to discuss your specific application.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Yard Sign Material for Outdoor Durability

Custom yard signs are manufactured using 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast), a durable material specifically designed for outdoor signage applications. This lightweight yet sturdy material features hollow flutes that run horizontally across standard 4' x 8' sheets, providing structural integrity while maintaining portability.

Material Properties

  • Thickness: 4mm corrugated plastic construction
  • Weight: Lightweight for easy installation and transport
  • Weather Resistance: Waterproof and UV-resistant for outdoor use
  • Color: White base material for optimal print vibrancy
  • Durability: Suitable for extended outdoor exposure

The corrugated plastic construction allows for both single-sided and double-sided printing options, accommodating various advertising needs. The material's hollow flute design provides excellent strength-to-weight ratio, making yard signs easy to handle while maintaining professional appearance.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Custom Sized Yard Signs

Edge Finishing

  • White Margin: 1/2" white border around printed area
  • Full Bleed: Ink printed to the edge of the sign

Printing Options

  • Single-Sided: Printing on one side only
  • Double-Sided: Full-color printing on both sides

Available Accessories

  • H Stakes: Available for 10x15, 10x24, or 10x30 signs
  • Beefy Stakes: Heavy-duty ground mounting option
  • Black Zip Ties: 12-inch length for secure mounting
  • White Zip Ties: 36-inch length for fence installation

Large Format Scoring

Signs exceeding 32" x 48" or where height plus width equals 81 inches or greater are automatically scored and folded for shipping. Scoring involves cutting through the top layer without penetrating the entire thickness, allowing the sign to fold for efficient shipping while maintaining structural integrity.

For applications requiring unfolded large format signs, oversized flat shipping options are available through our specialized shipping service.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Yard Sign Production & Turnaround Times

Production times for custom yard signs vary based on your project timeline requirements. All turnaround times begin after artwork approval and payment processing completion.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Fastest available production for urgent yard sign needs. Artwork must be print-ready and approved by specified cutoff times.

2 Business Days Express Production

Expedited production timeline for time-sensitive campaigns and events requiring quick turnaround.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Standard production timeline providing quality manufacturing without rush fees. Most popular option for planned campaigns.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Economy production timeline offering cost savings for projects with flexible deadlines.

Production Schedule: All production times are calculated in business days (Monday through Friday, excluding holidays). Production begins after final artwork approval and full payment processing.

Shipping Time: Production times do not include shipping transit time. Shipping duration depends on selected shipping method and destination location.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Custom Yard Sign Orders

Multiple payment methods are accepted for custom yard sign orders, providing flexibility for both individual and business customers.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • Business Accounts: Net payment terms available for qualified businesses
  • Purchase Orders: Accepted from established commercial accounts
  • Online Payment: Secure checkout processing for immediate order confirmation

Business Account Benefits

Commercial customers can establish business accounts for streamlined ordering and flexible payment terms. Business accounts provide access to volume pricing, extended payment terms, and dedicated customer service support.

Payment Processing

All payments are processed securely through encrypted systems. Orders with approved payment begin production immediately following artwork approval. Production timelines commence after successful payment processing completion.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Sized Yard Signs

Standard Shipping Parameters

Custom yard signs up to 32" x 48" ship flat without folding. Larger dimensions are automatically scored and folded to meet carrier size restrictions while maintaining sign integrity.

Automatic Scoring Policy

Signs exceeding 32" x 48" in any direction, or where combined height and width equals 81 inches or greater, receive automatic scoring. This process cuts through the top layer only, allowing controlled folding for efficient shipping.

Flat Shipping Options

Large format signs requiring flat shipping (without scoring or folding) are available through specialized oversized shipping services. Additional shipping charges apply for flat shipping of oversized yard signs.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Ground Shipping: Standard delivery for most locations
  • Expedited Shipping: Faster delivery options available
  • Flat Rate Shipping: Predictable costs for standard-sized orders
  • Oversized Shipping: Specialized handling for large format signs

Packaging Protection

All custom yard signs are carefully packaged to prevent damage during transit. Protective materials ensure signs arrive in excellent condition for immediate installation.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Common Uses for Custom Sized Yard Signs

Business Advertising Applications

  • Storefront Promotion: Special offers, new locations, business hours
  • Service Advertising: Lawn care, contracting, professional services
  • Event Marketing: Grand openings, sales events, seasonal promotions
  • Directional Signage: Parking directions, entrance identification

Real Estate Marketing

  • Property Listings: For sale and for rent property signs
  • Open House Events: Directional and informational signage
  • Development Marketing: New construction and subdivision promotion

Political Campaign Signage

  • Candidate Promotion: Name recognition and campaign messaging
  • Issue Advocacy: Ballot measures and community initiatives
  • Election Events: Rally announcements and voting reminders

Personal and Community Events

  • Garage Sales: Sale announcements and directional signs
  • Special Occasions: Birthday parties, graduations, celebrations
  • Community Events: Fundraisers, school events, neighborhood activities

Advantages of Custom Sizing

Custom sized yard signs accommodate specific space requirements, unusual dimensions, and unique installation needs. Non-standard sizes provide design flexibility while maintaining cost-effectiveness compared to other outdoor advertising methods.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Yard Sign Printing

Preferred File Formats

Optimal print quality is achieved with .eps files converted to outlines. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files are also acceptable for yard sign printing. Vector-based artwork provides the best results for text and graphics.

Resolution Requirements

  • Minimum Resolution: 150 DPI at actual print size
  • Recommended Resolution: 300 DPI for optimal print quality
  • Large Format: 100 DPI acceptable for signs over 48 inches

Design Specifications

  • Color Mode: CMYK color mode for accurate printing
  • Bleed Area: 0.125" bleed required for full-bleed designs
  • Safe Zone: Keep important text 0.25" from edges
  • Font Requirements: Convert text to outlines or embed fonts

Artwork Services Available

  • File Review: Pre-production artwork analysis
  • Design Assistance: Professional design services available
  • Proof Options: Digital proofs for approval before printing
  • Color Matching: Custom color matching services

Submission Methods

Artwork files can be uploaded during the online ordering process or submitted via email for large files. Design consultation services are available for customers requiring assistance with artwork preparation.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Sized Yard Signs for Your Business

Ready to create professional yard signs in any custom size? Our corrugated plastic yard signs provide durable outdoor advertising that withstands weather while delivering your message effectively.

Three Easy Ways to Order Custom Sized Yard Signs

Upload Print-Ready Artwork

  1. Select Product & Size: Choose yard signs and specify your custom dimensions
  2. Upload Your File: Submit your print-ready artwork directly from your computer
  3. Complete Order: Review specifications and submit for production

Let Our Designers Create Your Sign

  1. Select Product & Size: Choose yard signs and specify your custom dimensions
  2. Upload Reference Materials: Provide logos, images, or existing designs
  3. Provide Design Instructions: Include detailed specifications for our design team to create your custom yard sign

Professional Design Consultation

Contact our customer service team for design consultation and custom quote assistance. Our experienced professionals can help determine optimal sizing, materials, and design approaches for your specific application.

Contact Information:
Phone: 320-391-5300
Toll Free: 866-419-7446
Available Monday–Friday 8AM–4PM CST

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What material are custom yard signs made from?

Custom yard signs are manufactured using 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast). This durable, lightweight material is waterproof and UV-resistant, making it ideal for outdoor applications. The corrugated construction provides structural strength while maintaining easy portability.

Can I order double-sided custom yard signs?

Yes, double-sided printing is available for all custom yard sign sizes. Double-sided signs provide maximum visibility and message impact, allowing different designs or messages on each side. Both single-sided and double-sided options use the same durable 4mm corrugated plastic material.

What is the minimum order quantity for custom yard signs?

Custom yard signs can be ordered in quantities starting from a single sign. There is no minimum order requirement, making our service suitable for both individual customers and large-scale commercial orders.

What are custom yard signs commonly used for?

Custom yard signs serve diverse applications including business advertising, real estate marketing, political campaigns, event promotion, garage sales, and personal celebrations. Their versatility, affordability, and weather resistance make them effective for temporary and semi-permanent outdoor advertising needs.

What are the standard custom yard sign sizes available?

While we specialize in custom sizing, popular dimensions include 18"x24", 24"x36", and 12"x18". Custom sizes can accommodate virtually any dimension requirement. Signs larger than 32"x48" are automatically scored and folded for shipping efficiency.

What ground stake options are available for yard signs?

Available accessories include H-stakes for 10x15, 10x24, and 10x30 signs, heavy-duty beefy stakes for enhanced stability, 12-inch black zip ties, and 36-inch white zip ties for fence mounting applications.

Can I request a proof before my yard sign is printed?

Yes, digital proofs are available before production begins. Proof options include standard digital proofs and color match proof systems for critical color accuracy requirements. Proofs ensure your custom yard sign meets expectations before manufacturing.

What production times are available for custom yard signs?

Production options include 1-business-day priority, 2-business-day express, 3-business-day standard, and 5-business-day saver timelines. All production times begin after artwork approval and payment processing. Shipping time is additional to production time.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
